name: GreenPath Financial Wellness, San Antonio, TX
description_short: GreenPath Financial Wellness is a nonprofit credit counseling agency offering free and low-cost debt and credit counseling services via phone and in-person in San Antonio.
description_long:
GreenPath Financial Wellness operates as a nonprofit financial counseling organization serving the San Antonio area with a physical office located in the Balcones Heights neighborhood near the Connally Loop (I-410). The organization is part of a larger national network providing consumer financial education and counseling services. Their San Antonio office is positioned as an accessible resource for residents seeking professional guidance on financial management and debt resolution. GreenPath's mission centers on helping consumers resolve financial concerns and achieve financial stability through evidence-based counseling approaches.

The organization provides two primary service modalities: in-person financial counseling at their Piedras Drive location and telephone-based counseling available through a toll-free number. Services specifically include credit counseling and debt counseling, available both remotely and face-to-face. Clients can schedule in-person appointments during extended office hours (Monday 11am-6pm, Tuesday-Friday 8am-5pm Central) or access immediate phone support during designated telephone hours. The company offers both urgent assistance and scheduled appointment options to accommodate different client needs and circumstances.

GreenPath distinguishes itself through its nonprofit status, which typically indicates services are provided on a free or reduced-fee basis rather than as a profit-driven commercial enterprise. The organization emphasizes accessibility, with AudioEye-enabled website optimization, Spanish language support, and multiple contact channels (855-592-1403 for appointments, 877-933-9974 for immediate phone support, 210-979-4300 for the San Antonio office). The extended telephone hours and flexible scheduling options acknowledge that financial crises often occur outside standard business hours and clients may have work or caregiving constraints.

As a legitimate nonprofit counseling organization, GreenPath provides educational financial guidance rather than debt settlement or credit repair services. Consumers should understand that credit counseling involves budgeting review, debt management planning, and financial education—not guaranteed credit score improvements or removal of accurate negative items. The effectiveness of counseling depends significantly on client implementation of recommendations. For consumers in active financial crisis seeking immediate debt reduction or credit score improvement, this educational approach may require longer-term commitment than commercial alternatives promise.
address: 4243 E Piedras Dr Suite #270, San Antonio, TX 78228

company_info.headquarters: 4243 E Piedras Dr Suite #270, San Antonio, TX 78228

pros: Nonprofit organization typically offering free or low-cost counseling services
Multiple contact channels including toll-free numbers for immediate assistance
Extended phone counseling hours (Monday 3pm-10pm UTC, Tuesday 12pm-9pm UTC) for working adults
Flexible appointment scheduling with in-person and phone options available
Physical office location in San Antonio for clients preferring face-to-face counseling
Spanish language support available (Español option on website)
Established local presence with clearly stated office location and hours
cons: Phone counseling hours listed in UTC timezone, requiring conversion for Central Time clarity
No pricing information or fee structure disclosed on the location page
Limited service description—website does not detail specific outcomes, certifications (e.g., NFCC), or counselor qualifications
Debt counseling services may involve debt management plans requiring creditor participation, which not all creditors accept
No information about average timeline for financial improvement or success metrics
best_for: Consumers seeking free or low-cost financial education and budgeting guidance
San Antonio residents preferring in-person counseling with a local nonprofit organization
Spanish-speaking consumers needing financial counseling support
Working adults requiring evening or flexible phone counseling availability
diagnosis: GreenPath Financial Wellness is best suited for San Antonio-area consumers seeking nonprofit financial education and counseling to understand their debt situation and develop a repayment strategy. The primary caveat is that credit counseling provides guidance and planning rather than quick credit score improvement or debt reduction—clients must commit to implementing recommendations over several months, and success depends on creditor cooperation and sustained behavioral change.
